creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 213983
py-django-modern-rpc-assign-to-django22.patch

Hi Sunpoet,

attached is the patch that assigns www/py-django-modern-rpc to Django 2.2 (current LTS release) because Django 1.11 is End-of-Life since April 2020.

QA:
~~~
- poudriere (11.3-RELEASE amd64 for each py35, py36, py37 and py38 flavor) -> OK
- portlint -> OK (Adjust length of COMMENT to pet portlint)
